_doc: Imported from Vibe-Calculators/.appliance/manifest.json (upstream commit on main, 2026-05-05). Schema-conformant against console/manifest.schema.json without translation.
description: TValue-grade time-value-of-money calculations and a tax-advisory calculator suite for CPA firms.

optional.name: VIBE_KMS_KEY
optional.doc: AES-256-GCM key (32 bytes, base64) used to encrypt the per-firm Anthropic API key at rest. Aliased to the appliance-wide ENCRYPTION_KEY.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
optional.doc: Claude API key for AI-assisted loan-agreement extraction (Phase 23). Inherited from appliance.env unless overridden per-app.

ui.label: Anthropic API key
ui.helpText: Powers AI-assisted loan-agreement extraction. The same key is used appliance-wide unless overridden per-app.

optional.name: VIBE_AFR_FEED_URL
optional.doc: IRS AFR feed URL. Defaults to the appliance-wide value.

firstLogin.note: First request lands on /install; create the admin account there.
